# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Create a Deployment Manager template for VPC network with subnets for our three-tier application. Use auto-create subnets mode for simplicity so GCP creates subnet ranges automatically. This speeds up deployment without manual IP planning.
# Category: cloud_network_security

resources:
  - name: vpc
    type: google_compute_network
    properties:
      auto_create_subnetworks: true

  - name: subnet-public
    type: google_compute_subnetwork
    properties:
      network: $(ref.vpc.name)
      region: us-central1
      ip_cidr_range: 192.168.0.0/24

  - name: subnet-private-app
    type: google_compute_subnetwork
    properties:
      network: $(ref.vpc.name)
      region: us-central1
      ip_cidr_range: 192.168.1.0/24

  - name: subnet-private-db
    type: google_compute_subnetwork
    properties:
      network: $(ref.vpc.name)
      region: us-central1
      ip_cidr_range: 192.168.2.0/24
